manifest.name: currency-converter
manifest.author: DreamLayer Team
manifest.description: Look at a foreign price and see it in your own money, right on the panel. Live rate, no mental math, no phone.
manifest.forwho: For travellers and anyone shopping across a border.
long: Abroad, prices stop being abstract. Look at a tag or a menu and the number shows up in your home currency, inline.
It uses live exchange rates, free and no account, and shows you the rate it used so you know what you're really paying.
Only the number and its currency get looked up. Never where you are, never what you bought.
